hero.badge: Free forever · No credit card needed
hero.headline:
Your family's story
deserves to be told
hero.subheadline: LoomBox uses AI to help you gather, write, and beautifully preserve the stories, photos, and memories that make your family unique.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to preserve what matters

ai.title: AI Story Weaver
ai.desc: Our AI asks thoughtful questions, suggests phrasing, and helps you bring memories to life in your own voice.

tree.title: Family Tree
tree.desc: Build your family tree and link stories, photos, and recipes to each member across generations.

images.title: AI-Generated Illustrations
images.desc: Automatically generate era-accurate illustrations and historical context for every story you tell.

book.title: Beautiful Books
book.desc: Choose from three stunning book styles and download a print-ready PDF to treasure forever.

heritage.name: Heritage
heritage.desc: Warm and timeless, like an antique journal

scrapbook.name: Scrapbook
scrapbook.desc: Playful and personal, a handcrafted feel

cta.title: Start preserving your
cta.sub: Free forever. No credit card. Your stories, beautifully told.

dashboard.progressSub: {{count}} of 10 stories added to your book

empty.title: Your story begins here
empty.sub: Every family has stories worth telling. Let AI help you find the words.

stories.title: Stories
stories.noStoriesDesc: Every great book starts with a first story.

story.title: Story title
story.locationPlaceholder: e.g. Warsaw, Poland · Tel Aviv · Brooklyn
story.whatIsStoryDesc: Give your story a name and set the scene — AI will use this to find historical context and generate the perfect illustration.
story.tellYourStoryDesc: Write freely in your own words. Don't worry about perfection — AI will help you polish it next. Use the prompts if you need inspiration.
story.aiEnhancedDesc: Review the enhanced version below. You can edit it freely — it's still your story, just beautifully told.
story.readyDesc: This is how your story will appear in your family book. You can always edit it later.
story.choosePrompt: Choose a prompt to add to your story
story.skipTooltip: Skip AI enhancement and save as-is
story.suggestTitleTooltip: Suggest a title based on your story
story.deleteConfirm: Delete this story? This cannot be undone.
story.writePlaceholder:
Start writing your story here…

You can write in whatever way feels natural. Don't worry about perfect sentences — just get your memories down. AI will help you shape them beautifully in the next step.
